title: parapolystichum rufescens
intro: Parapolystichum rufescens, also known as the rusty-backed shield fern, is a species of fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Parapolystichum rufescens include its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. It can be prepared in herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, allowing for various ways to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
